summary: Package exfiltrates data to Telegram bot API
details: The package file 66o.js (lines 31 and 34) contains calls to api.telegram.org/bot.../sendMessage with chat_id parameters, indicating a Telegram-based exfiltration channel hard-coded into the package. Telegram bot endpoints are a well-known exfiltration mechanism used to silently relay captured data (environment variables, credentials, user-provided input) to an attacker-controlled chat. The package name '8oo' is low-signal/throwaway and provides no legitimate reason to call a chat platform API. Installing or loading this package risks leaking installer-side data or caller-supplied data to the author's Telegram bot.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
